array_types.name: Btable_Type
array_types.code:
type Btable_Type is array (UInt4) of EP_Group with
   Volatile;

record_types.name: EP_Group
USB_ADDRN_RX_Register
USB_ADDRN_TX_Register
USB_COUNTN_RX_Register
USB_COUNTN_TX_Register

variables.name: Btable
